title: Cybersecurity Implementation Solution Specialist
subtitle: Planning, Implementation, Documentation & Security Operations
bullets: Plan and implement cybersecurity solutions in enterprise environments, ensuring secure deployment of endpoint protection and threat detection systems.
Configure, document, and optimize security implementations aligned with organizational requirements and risk mitigation strategies.
Assist in the evaluation and deployment of security architectures, supporting decision-making through technical analysis and research.
Collaborate with internal teams and clients to strengthen security posture, ensure compliance, and maintain operational security standards.
Document configurations, procedures, and implementation processes to ensure consistency, scalability, and knowledge transfer.

title: Program Representative
subtitle: Software Engineering & MIS
bullets: Coordinated and executed academic, technological, and community-focused events, including workshops, talks, and extracurricular activities.
Provided direct academic guidance and mentorship to students, supporting their learning paths and professional development.
Promoted collaborative work, student leadership, and active participation within the university community.
Represented the Software Engineering & MIS program in internal initiatives and institutional events.

title: Web Developer & UI/UX Designer
subtitle: Writing Studio & Tutoring Center
bullets: Design and develop web, mobile, and desktop applications with role-based access for academic tutoring management.
Build frontend interfaces using React and Vite, focusing on usability and responsive design.
Integrate RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js for efficient data management.
Lead project planning, task distribution, financial management, and technical documentation.
Create UML diagrams to model system architecture and ensure scalable design.

title: Peer Tutor
subtitle: Academic Support
bullets: Support fellow students through peer-to-peer education, assisting with coursework, problem-solving, and exam preparation.
Adapt explanations to different learning styles to improve understanding of technical and academic concepts.
Encourage independent learning and confidence in academic performance.

title: Technical Support Agent
subtitle: Microsoft Entra ID & Outlook
bullets: Provide technical support for Microsoft Entra ID, managing user access, identity synchronization, and domain-related issues.
Configure and troubleshoot Active Directory and DNS environments affecting authentication services.
Resolve Outlook email connectivity issues involving IMAP, SMTP, and POP3 protocols.

title: Project Management Assistant & Program Assistant
subtitle: AI & Academic Operations
bullets: Support the Software Engineering & MIS Program Director in academic management and project coordination.
Prepare technical and administrative documentation, including reports, meeting minutes, and executive summaries.
Coordinate and monitor institutional AI projects and initiatives.
Design and deliver an introductory Machine Learning course with robotics demonstrations using AutoAuto Cars.

title: Academic Dean's Assistant
subtitle: Administration
bullets: Assist the Academic Dean with administrative and academic coordination tasks.
Prepare reports, documentation, and summaries to support decision-making processes.
Support communication between academic departments and administrative offices.
